home.subtitle: Let's keep your momentum going.
home.continue_empty: Your enrolled courses will show up here.
home.start_body: Your courses in progress will show up here. Pick one below to begin.
home.tip_body: Short, daily sessions beat cramming — 15 focused minutes today builds recall that lasts.

recall.title: Recall before review
recall.body: After each lesson, close the notes and explain the main idea from memory.

spacing.title: Return tomorrow
spacing.body: A quick revisit after sleep strengthens memory more than one long session.

focus.title: One idea at a time
focus.body: Finish one micro-lesson, pause, then move on when the key point feels clear.

home.empty_courses: No courses are published yet. Check back soon!

lesson.title: Lesson
lesson.heading: Watch, read, recall
lesson.body: Keep the session short, follow the transcript when useful, then move into recall while the idea is fresh.
lesson.tip_body: Dexta lessons are built around micro-learning: complete this one, then pause long enough to explain the key point in your own words.

leaderboard.title: Awards & leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Most-improved rankings appear once you join a cohort.
leaderboard.empty_body: Complete lessons and assessments to earn points and claim your spot on the {{type}} board.
leaderboard.preview_note: Example standings — live rankings activate when you join a cohort.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences.
profile.name: Name
profile.phone_unverified: Not verified — used for study reminders.

my.title: My Learning
my.empty: Start a course and it'll show up here so you can continue anytime.
my.subtitle: Pick up where you left off and track your wins.
my.resume: Pick up where you left off
